titleStmt.title: SII 26.658: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 658. (A.R. No. 617 of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same maṇḍapa.
This inscription is built in on the left side and at the bottom.

It records the gift by sale of 2 and 9-1/2 mā (49-1/2 mā) of land and 1-1/2 mā of kitchen-garden land (kollai), in Tiruchcheṟai as tax-free tiruchchennaḍaippuṟam to the goddess of the bed-room in the temple of the god Tiruchchenneṟiuḍaiyār of the place, by the mahāsabhai including the Baṭṭars of Biramadēyam Viśalūr. The land was sold to the temple itself for a sum of 248 kāśu.

It also records a gift by sale 9-1/2 mā of cultivable land in the same place, as tax-free land to the temple of the god [••••]-nāyanār. The land was sold to the same temple, by the same mahāsabhai, for a sum of 47(1/2) kāśu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu piramateyam vicalūr paṭṭapperumakkaḷuḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom Innāṭṭut tirucceṟai
maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruccenneṟi Uṭaiyār koyilukkut tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nācciyāṟku tiruccennaṭaippuṟamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu I
ku Arumoḻiteva vāykkālukku teṟkum Uloccana Aṉantanārāyaṇaṉum kiḷinallūr calamattiyaṉ Irā
devaṉum nilattukku merkkum rājarājavāykkālukku vaṭakkumāka Ivvicainta perunāṉkellai
nilam kavuṇiyan ponmalaimāteva paṭṭaṉum pālāciriyan citaran mātavaṉum pālāciriyan pattampiri
loccan jātavetapaṭṭaṉum Uloccan jātavetan kumaraṉum ciriḷaṅkoccakali caṭa
ṭṭārumāka Ivvaṉaivar pakkalum Ittiruccenneriyuṭaiyār tirunāmat tāl vilaikoṇṭu
mmāyiruntanilam Iraṇṭe Onpatinmāvarai Innilam Iraṇṭe Onpatu māvaraiyum Inilam Itte
ṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta maṉai nilamāvatu vaṭakkiṟ cerinattattil kiḻakkaṭaiya ponmalai mātevaṉum māṭa
tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanum māṭalan cikārimāṟan Agniyumuḷḷiṭṭār pakkale Ittevar tirunāmattāl vilaikoṇ
natta nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai putuvūrvatikku meṟkum tenpārk kellai kavuṇiyan ponmalaimāta tu
liyāka tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai meṟpaṭiyān ko
ḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai noyyān kaṇavati nilattukkum cipattap piriyattāḻvār Iṟaiyili nilattukkum Olo
nilattukkum teṟkkum Āka Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvu paṭṭa kollai nilam Orumāvarai Āka ma
lam Iraṇṭaraiye Orumā Innilamiraṇṭaraiye Orumāvum cantrādittavaṟ śāśvatikamāka Iṟaiyiliceytu kuṭu
neṟiyuṭaiyār cipaṇṭārattu tevakanmikaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭār kaivaḻikoṇṭa kācu Irunūṟṟu nāṟpatteṭṭum kaicce
Innilam Iraṇṭaraiye Orumāvum Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutto vicalūr mahāsabhaiyom ....innam Ivvūr mahāsa
nāyanāṟku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta viḷainilamāvatu putuvūrvatikku kiḻakku rājarājavāykkālukku vaṭakku nāṅ
ytu kuṭutta viḷainilattukku kiḻpārkkellai vicalūrar cipattappiriyattāḻvār Iṟaiyili viḷainilattukku meṟkum
rājarājavāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Innācciyāṟku tiruccennaṭaippuṟamāka nāṅkaḷ I
ttukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Arumoḻitevavāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkel
Iṭattile kiḷinallūr cālāpattiyan centapirān śrīvāsuteva paṭṭan pakkalum pālāciriyan Anantanārāyaṇan
n Aṉantanārāyaṇan pakkalum vilaikoṇṭu Ittevaṟku somamāyirunta viḷainilam Onpatin māvarai Inni
rkku Iṟaiyiliyāka cantrātittavaṟ śāśvatikamāka Iṟaiyiliceytu kuṭuttu Innāyanār śrīpaṇṭārattu tevakaṉmikaḷ
patteḻarai Ikkācu nāṟpatteḻaraiyuṅkoṇṭu Innilam Onpatinmāvaraiyum cantrātittavaṟ śāśvatikamāka IṟaiBuilt in at the beginning and at the bottom.
Digital edition of SII 26.658 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
